blocks.text: The Etihad title decider — Arsenal can go nine points clear today
Arsenal lead City by six but Guardiola's side hold a game in hand. Lose today and Arteta's title dream gets very complicated. Win, and the Gunners are on the brink of ending a 21-year wait.
🏎️ 17:00 — Bahrain GP: Antonelli (72pts) leads Russell (63pts) in wide-open F1 title fight
🎮 Mon 02:00 — IEM Rio 2026: Norwegian legend rain opens CS2 Major title hunt
